name: SL GREEN REALTY CORP
summary: PART I General SL Green Realty Corp. is a self-managed real estate investment trust, or REIT, primarily engaged in the ownership, management, operation, acquisition, development, redevelopment, repositioning and financing of commercial real estate properties, principally office properties, located in the New York metropolitan area, principally in Manhattan, a borough of New York City. We were formed in June, 1997 for the purpose of continuing the commercial real estate business of S.L. Green Pro...
